name: Shot Image Binary
description: Binary yes/no evaluation of shot image prompt quality — does it create a prompt for one specific shot matching framing and narrative beat?

questions.question: Does the composition match the shot type from the motion JSON (close-up = face fills frame, wide = full environment)?
Does it depict the specific story beat described in the shot's motion description — not a generic composition?
Are only the characters relevant to this specific shot described (not all scene characters)?
Does the prompt describe camera distance, angle, and depth of field consistent with the shot type?
Are only shot-relevant reference images included (close-up of Alice → only Alice's ref)?

If the shot requires a character to look different from their reference image (different clothing, injuries, disguise, wet/dirty/undressed), does the prompt describe those specific differences? If no changes are needed, does it avoid redundantly re-describing what the reference already shows?
Lighting specified with source, direction, and quality?
Could this shot plausibly sit in sequence with adjacent shots from the same scene?
